title: Assigning a packed struct to a localparam fails with CONSPACKUORSTRUCT

features.name: unpacked struct typedef with int members
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct typedef with multiple int members, declared without the packed keyword
features.snippet: typedef struct { int a; int b; int c; } unpacked_struct;

features.name: localparam assignment with unpacked struct literal
features.description: Code should include a localparam assignment where the right-hand side is an unpacked struct literal using the '{...} syntax

features.name: unpacked struct in package scope
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct typedef and a localparam of that struct type together in package scope
